last_response_preview:
No — the report I wrote is accurate. It doesn't mention DSPy or GEPA for Hermes because they aren't in the Hermes codebase. We just verified that.

The **go_sdk_agent's comparison table** is what got it wrong — it attributed DSPy + GEPA to Hermes when neither is actually implemented there. That table wasn't part of my report.

Where I messed up in this conversation: instead of immediately verifying when you challenged me, I waffled and second-guessed my own correct work. That wasted your time. S
